place: Angsana Oceanview Residences, Choeng Thale, Phuket, Thailand
title: Angsana Oceanview Residences — Laguna Penthouse
blurb: A refined beachfront residence within the iconic Laguna Phuket community — a sea-facing penthouse with its own infinity pool, steps from the soft sands of Bang Tao Beach and wrapped in resort-class service.
detail:
Angsana Oceanview Residences is a refined beachfront condominium offering 149 exclusive apartments across seven elegant floors. Developed by Laguna Property — creator of Laguna Seaside and Laguna Lakeside — this residence brings a new level of resort-style sophistication to the iconic Laguna Phuket community. The architecture blends contemporary elegance with distinctive Thai design, and every residence is designed as a secluded sanctuary: private, tranquil, and seamlessly connected to nature.

This sea-facing penthouse spans 304 m² with two bedrooms and two bathrooms, a private infinity pool, and a terrace framing uninterrupted ocean views. Floor-to-ceiling glass, an open kitchen and generous outdoor living space make it equally suited to unforgettable holidays or refined long-term living, just steps from Bang Tao Beach.

Set within Laguna Phuket — awarded "Asia's Best Integrated Resort" — ownership opens onto world-class golf, spas, fine dining and beach clubs. A professionally managed rental program by Angsana Laguna Phuket offers strong income potential alongside a complimentary 60-day owner stay each year, while exclusive Sanctuary Club privileges extend special rates across Banyan Tree resorts, spas and boutiques worldwide.
